items.content_html: ⛩ Yochimu means prophetic dream in Japanese. The purpose of this tool is to let you read comfortably any kind of text, by reviewing and learning its vocabulary using an in-context approach with sentences using an SRS solutions like Anki. What Yochimu does is, given a file with text in Japanese, it returns a list of words from that text along with their definitions, translations and example sentences, to let you create decks.
items.title: ernestohegi/japanese-text-parser: ⛩ Yochimu means prophetic dream in Japanese. The purpose of this tool is to let you read comfortably any kind of text, by reviewing and learning its vocabulary using an in-context approach with sentences using an SRS solutions like Anki.  What Yochimu does is, given a file with text in Japanese, it returns a list of words from that text along with their definitions, translations and example sentences, to let you create decks.

items.content_html: The Chat-GPT-Flashcards-To-Anki-Converter is a project that aims to revolutionize the way students study by simplifying the process of creating Anki flashcards from ChatGPT-generated content. By copying and pasting the text into Chat GPT, users can generate flashcards and then, with a single click, convert them into Anki-compatible format.
items.title: AlexToumayan/Chat-GPT-Flashcards-To-Anki-Converter: The Chat-GPT-Flashcards-To-Anki-Converter is a project that aims to revolutionize the way students study by simplifying the process of creating Anki flashcards from ChatGPT-generated content. By copying and pasting the text into Chat GPT, users can generate flashcards and then, with a single click, convert them into Anki-compatible format.
